title: vignea divulsa subsp. leersiana
intro: Vignea divulsa subsp. leersiana, also known as Cornish heath, is a flowering plant species in the heath family (Ericaceae). It is native to western parts of Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system health. Herbal preparations of Cornish heath, such as tea and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
